leads.title: Mortem Datus
leads.author: AlexxKP
leads.description: Experimental horror-game
leads.pitch_sfx: His atmospheric and punchy sound design would excel at creating the brooding, tension-filled environments and impactful feedback essential for an experimental horror game.
leads.pitch_music: His heavy, doom-influenced music can provide the intense, unsettling atmosphere that an experimental horror game often demands.
leads.reason: The experimental horror genre is a strong fit for his atmospheric, brooding, and heavy musical styles, and the lack of explicit hiring suggests an opportunity to pitch proactive audio services.

leads.title: D.I.E: Departamento Infernal de Encomendas
leads.author: Plix
leads.pitch_sfx: His atmospheric and punchy sound design expertise would excel at creating the brooding, oppressive environments and impactful gameplay moments characteristic of a horror game like D.I.E.
leads.pitch_music: The game's likely dark and intense themes would be perfectly complemented by his heavy metalcore, doom metal, and Thall musical styles, especially the Argent Metal influence of DOOM.
leads.reason: This horror game on itch.io presents a strong opportunity for his atmospheric, punchy, and heavy music specialties, making it a high-priority lead.

leads.title: Spooker Demo
leads.author: Space Dragon Games
leads.description: Spooker is a horror roguelite pool-like where every shot counts and every mistake could be your last.
leads.pitch_sfx: His punchy, high-impact SFX will deliver the satisfying feedback needed for a punishing roguelite where every shot and mistake carries weight.
leads.pitch_music: The heavy, brooding nature of his metalcore and doom metal aligns perfectly with the intense, oppressive atmosphere of a horror roguelite.
leads.reason: This horror roguelite is a strong fit for the sound designer's atmospheric and punchy SFX, as well as his heavy music, all crucial for creating an immersive and tense player experience.

leads.title: The Black Cube

leads.description: A mysterious black cube.
leads.pitch_sfx: His ability to create brooding, tension-building atmospheric soundscapes would perfectly complement the 'mysterious black cube' concept and the horror genre, delivering deep, immersive environmental audio.
leads.pitch_music: The developer's interest in the horror genre suggests that the composer's heavy/doom metal and Thall styles could provide intense, driving, and unsettling musical accompaniment to enhance the game's atmosphere and impact.
leads.reason: The game's description and itch.io tag strongly indicate a need for atmospheric and potentially intense audio, making the sound designer's and composer's specialties a very strong fit.

leads.reason: The game's horror genre and implied atmospheric/intense themes are a strong match for the sound designer's specialties, making it a high-priority lead.
